title: Snapshot code viewer
summary: Adds a Code tab for Snapshots with curated changed files, inline diff/full-file viewing, and client-side Shiki syntax highlighting.

risks.title: Shiki adds syntax-highlighting chunks to embedded UI assets; narrowed to selected languages and themes to limit asset churn.

decisions.title: Keep code evidence additive by deriving curated files from existing Snapshot content instead of changing the canonical snapshot schema.
